arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich monitoring Sporting CP star striker Viktor Gyökeres closely
arts.sum: He has given new life to Sporting and allowed them to reclaim a spot as the top club in Portugal. Bayern Munich already planning for life after Harry Kane?

arts.ttl: Rummenigge gushes about Manuel Neuer’s importance, recalls 2020 CL final that Bayern Munich “would never have won without him”
arts.sum: But what might come as a surprise to casual football fans is that a goalkeeper in Manuel Neuer also fully deserves his spot on the list. When one compiles a list of Bayern Munich ’s most important transfers in the past 15 years, there will be several names such as Arjen Robben, Javi Martinez and Robert Lewandowski on the list.

arts.ttl: St Pauli vs Bayern Munich: Lineups are out! Leon Goretzka is FINALLY starting again!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich used to enjoy visits to Hamburg, but ever since HSV got relegated, it’s not been the same. Otherwise, the lineup is pretty much what we’ve come to expect from Vincent Kompany at Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich predicted XI vs St. Pauli: Harry Kane to lead Vincent Kompany’s attack
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany is expected to name the same Bayern Munich team that beat Union Berlin last weekend as the Rekordmeister look to maintain their unbeaten record heading into the international…

arts.ttl: 'I'm tipped to replace Liverpool's Mo Salah - Vincent Kompany can't believe how good I am'
arts.sum: A player who has already dropped the jaw of Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany is already being touted as a possible replacement for Mohamed Salah at Liverpool

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including St Pauli vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including St Pauli vs. Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich hesitant to extend Leroy Sané?; Alphonso Davies honored; Liverpool wants Real Madrid star; Robert Lewandowski staying another year at FC Barcelona?; Which Manchester United player wasn’t wanted by Erik ten Hag?; and MORE!
arts.sum: It has been widely expected that Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané would be in-line to sign a contract extension during this season. Sané’s salary requirements might be too much for Bayern Munich to stomach when other internal moves (Joshua Kimmich, Jamal Musiala) and potential transfers (like Florian Wirtz) are expected to put a big dent into the club’s salary budget:

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Aleksandar Pavlović already back working on the ball and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlović saw his season interrupted by a broken collarbone, but that has not deterred the youngster. Aleks Pavlović trained with the ball for the first time today since his injury!

arts.ttl: Cup battle looming, Leverkusen ace Victor Boniface names Bayern Munich defenders among toughest opponents
arts.sum: Because even irresistible force meets immovable object — and Boniface named Bayern Munich’s current center-back duo, Dayot Upamecano and Kim Min-jae, among his top three of challenging defenders to go up against. Bayern Munich has drawn Bayer Leverkusen in the third round of the DFB-Pokal — an early-tournament tilt between two of the Bundesliga’s top teams.

arts.ttl: Kit Color Leak: Bayern Munich’s next Oktoberfest kit will be...
arts.sum: The main color of Bayern's Oktoberfest kit for next season will be light beige [ @Footy_Headlines ] pic.twitter.com/O5NtLhGD40 As has been the case for the past four seasons, Bayern Munich will be releasing a special Oktoberfest kit next year as well, and while specific designs are naturally yet to be seen, the kit’s main color has been revealed.
